epigraph.quote: Log fire in the woods. Games — football & frisbee in the field. Large flock of sheep.

moments.quote: we went to church & then on to Enville for lunch in a field.
Lovely hills visible from the house, Caer Caradoc, Church Stretton. 3 kinds of cake! Beautiful stream & garden.
We walked before bed. It was warm in the sun. 2 families had b.b.q.s. Log fire in the woods.
On to Oswestry by a route to the west partly in Wales
